{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = First Fisher
| introduced = cradle-02-soulsmith
}}

== Soulsmith ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|The [[First Fisher]] is one of the richest individuals in the Wilds.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c15">''Soulsmith'', chapter 15</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Soulsmith]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
